'''Anai''' was the larger of the two main continents of [[Lianna/Legends|Lianna]]. It included the [[Capital/Legends|capital]], [[Lianna City]], and the [[City/Legends|cities]] of [[Lola Curich]], [[Anxarta]], and [[Melford]].

{{Nature-stub}}
